<onlyinclude><templatestyles src="Infobox_crafting/styles.css" /><infobox theme="crafting-infobox">
    <title source="name">
        <format><center>'''{{{name}}}'''</format>
    </title>
    <panel>
        <data source="min_level">
            <label>Min Level</label>
            <format>{{{min_level}}}</format>
        </data>
    </panel>
</infobox></onlyinclude>
==Documentation==
Singleton infobox for the Crafting page.

[[Category:Templates]]
